IndexFungorum.TYPIFICATION_x0020_DETAILS: Typification: Tab. XXVII (Sch.); Tab. LXXVII, fig. 2 (Micheli)
IndexFungorum.EDITORIAL_x0020_COMMENT: Circumscription includes the type of a name (Agaricus muscarius L. 1753), the epithet of which ought to have been adopted
537188$Agaricus muscarius var. formosus J. Kickx f. 1835

Saccardo's Syll. fung. V: 13; XII: 906; XIX: 49
Saccardo's Syll. fung. V: 13; XIX: 52 |Index of Fungi 5: 826

IndexFungorum.HOST: on acid soil under Castanea sativa and Populus tremula
